default.notes: Public WebVM Debian image. Used as a fallback so the page boots even before the rust-alpine release pipeline has run; cargo/rustup work from inside via apt + curl. The page-side workspace store still serves /workspace/hello_world.rs to the Explorer regardless of which disk is mounted.

warm.notes: Pre-baked rust-alpine.ext2 — i386 Alpine + bash + rustc + cargo + a hello-world Cargo project under /workspace/hello. Built by web/disk/build.sh and uploaded as the rolling 'disk-latest' release asset. The committed manifest leaves warm.url unset; web/build/stage-pages-disk.mjs fills it with ./disk/rust-alpine.ext2 only after generating CheerpX GitHubDevice chunks in the Pages artifact. The browser must not fetch the GitHub Release asset directly because its redirect target is not CORS-readable.
